questions.text: ब्रिटिशांनी मुझफ्फरपूर बॉम्ब खटल्या संबंधातील लिखाणाबाबत _________ यांच्यावर देशद्रोहाचा खटला दाखल केला होता.

प्रार्थना समाजाच्या वतीने खालीलपैकी कोणती सामाजिक कामे केली होती?
(a) ना.म. जोशी यांनी 'सोशल सर्व्हिस लिग' स्थापून मजुरांची स्थिती सुधारण्याचे प्रयत्न केले.
(b) देशसेवेसाठी चांगले कार्यकर्ते निर्माण करण्याच्या उद्देश्याने नामदार गोखले यांनी 'सर्व्हंट्स् ऑफ इंडिया सोसायटी' ही संस्था स्थापन केली.
(c) या समाजाच्या वतीने नाशिक येथे अनाथआश्रम काढले.
(d) अस्पृश्यांच्या उन्नतीसाठी महर्षी विठ्ठल रामजी शिंदे यांनी डिप्रेस्ड क्लासेस मिशन ही संस्था स्थापन केली.

राजर्षी छत्रपती शाहू महाराजांसंदर्भात खालीलपैकी कोणती विधाने बरोबर आहेत?
(a) सक्तीचा व मोफत शिक्षणाचा कायदा केला.
(b) विविध कला व कलाकारांना आश्रय दिला.
(c) विधवा पुनर्विवाह कायदा पारित केला.
(d) कोल्हापुरात व्यापारासाठी 'शाहुपुरी' या व्यापारपेठेची स्थापना केली.

खालीलपैकी कोणत्या नेत्यांनी आयटक या कामगार संघटनेचे अध्यक्षपद भूषविले नाही?
(a) बी.टी. रणदिवे
(b) सरोजिनी नायडू
(c) सी.आर. दास
(d) जवाहरलाल नेहरू

जोड्या लावा.
(a) मुकुंदराव पाटील - (i) विजयी मराठा
(b) वा.र. कोठारी - (ii) जागृती
(c) भगवंत पाळेकर - (iii) जागरूक
(d) श्रीपतराव शिंदे - (iv) दीनमित्र
1887 मध्ये मद्रास येथे झालेल्या भारतीय राष्ट्रीय कॉँग्रेसचे अधिवेशन कोणाच्या अध्यक्षतेखाली झाले?

अचुक जोड्या लावा.
(a) भारतीय सुशासनाचा कायदा -1858 - (i) मुस्लिमांना स्वतंत्र मतदार संघ
(b) भारतीय परिषद (कौन्सिल) कायदा - 1909 - (ii) मंत्रिमंडळ पद्धतीचा पाया
(c) भारत सरकारचा कायदा - 1919 - (iii) प्रांतात द्विदल शासन पद्धती
(d) भारत सरकारचा कायदा - 1935 - (iv) भारतमंत्री पदाची निर्मिती
(v) केंद्रात द्विदल शासन पद्धती

1857 च्या उठावानंतर बंगालमधील नीळ उत्पादक शेतकऱ्यांना मळेवाल्याविरुद्ध उठावात यश मिळण्याचे कारण कोणते?
(a) उपक्रमशीलता व सहकार्य
(b) संघटना व शिस्त
(c) मळेवाल्यात पडलेली फूट
(d) हिंदू-मुस्लिम शेतकरी ऐक्य

जोड्या जुळवा:
(a) मोपल्याचे बंड - (i) खानदेश (महाराष्ट्र)
(b) कोलांचा उठाव - (ii) केरळ
(c) संथाळ्चा उठाव - (iii) बिहार
(d) भिल्लांचा उठाव - (iv) बंगाल
_________ या मुंबई पोलीस कमिशनरने ब्रिटीश राजवटीविरुद्ध कारवाया करणार्‍यांना फाशी देण्यासाठी वधस्तंभ उभारला होता.

खालील विधानांचा विचार करा:
(a) रायरेश्वरपासून शिंगणापूरपर्यंत पसरलेल्या रांगेला शंभू-महादेव डोंगररांग असे म्हणतात.
(b) सातपुडा पर्वतरांगमुळे नर्मदा व तापी नदीचे खोरे अलग झालेले आहे.
(c) हरिश्चंद्र-बालाघाट डोंगररांगमुळे गोदावरी व भीमा नदीचे खोरे अलग झालेले आहे.
(d) गोदावरी व तापी नदीच्या खोऱ्याना वेगळी करणारी सातमाळा-अर्जिंटा डोंगररांग आहे.
वरीलपैकी कोणते विधान/विधाने बरोबर आहे/आहेत?
2011 च्या जनगणनेनुसार महाराष्ट्रातील खालीलपैकी कोणत्या तीन जिल्ह्यामध्ये ऋणात्मक लोकसंख्येचा वृद्धीदर दर्शविती?
संचालनालय, खनिज विभाग, नागपूर यांच्या 2014 च्या आकडेवारी प्रमाणे महाराष्ट्रात लोहखनिजाचे साठे कोणत्या जिल्ह्यात अधिक आहेत?

जोड्या जुळवा.
स्तंभ A (कोपेन हवामान) - स्तंभ B (हवामान प्रकार)
(a) Cwg - (i) उष्ण वाळवंट
(b) BWhw - (ii) थंड आणि आर्द हवामान
(c) Dfc - (iii) उष्ण कटिबंधीय मोसमी
(d) Amw - (iv) मेसोथर्मल

खालील विधाने विचारात घ्या.
(a) चिनाब नदी झोजीला खिंडीजवळ उगम पावते.
(b) रावी नदीचा उगम रोहतांग खिंडीजवळ आहे.
(c) सतलज नदीचा उगम रकास तलावाजवळ आहे.
वरीलपैकी कोणते विधान/विधाने बरोबर आहे/त?

खालीलपैकी कोणते/कोणती विधान/विधाने महाराष्ट्राच्या पर्जन्याबाबत अचूक आहे/आहेत?
(a) महाराष्ट्रात पावसाळ्याच्या आरंभी पश्चिमेकडून पूर्वेकडे वायुभार कमी होत जातो.
(b) राज्यातील पर्जन्याचे वितरण प्रामुख्याने नैसर्गिक वनस्पतीच्या वितरणावर अवलंबून असल्याचे आढळते.
(c) नैऋत्य मोसमी वारे घाट माथ्यावरून पूर्वेकडे जातात तेव्हा त्यांची बाष्पधारणशक्ती वाढते.
(d) विदर्भामध्ये पश्चिमेकडून पूर्वेकडे पावसाचे प्रमाण वाढत जाते.

खालीलपैकी कोणते विधान/ने चुकीचे/ची आहे/आहेत?
(a) कामठी कोळसा क्षेत्र आंब नदीच्या खोऱ्यात आहे.
(b) वर्धा खोऱ्यातील कोळसा क्षेत्र चंद्रपुर व यवतमाळ जिल्ह्यात विभागलेले आहे.
(c) उमरेड कोळसा क्षेत्र कन्हान नदीच्या खोऱ्यात आहे.
(d) महाराष्ट्रातील तुर्भे या ठिकाणी कॅनडाच्या सहाय्याने अप्सरा आणि ब्रिटनच्या सहाय्याने सायरस या अणुभट्ट्या उभारण्यात आलेल्या आहेत.

पाणलोट क्षेत्र विकास कार्यक्रमाचे खालीलपैकी कोणते उद्देश्य आहेत?
(a) भूमी उपयोजन आणि उत्पादनात पर्याप्त वाढ करणे.
(b) बाह्या पाण्याला नियंत्रित करून भूमीचे क्षरण थांबवणे.
(c) गुंतवणूक कमी, उत्पादन खर्चात वाढ करणे.

खालील विधाने पहा.
(a) महात्मा फुले कृषी विद्यापीठाचे डाळिंब तंत्रज्ञान संशोधन केंद्र लखमापूर येथे आहे.
(b) फुले यशोदा गव्हाने वाण महात्मा फुले कृषी विद्यापीठाने 1998 मधे विकसित केले.
(c) महाराष्ट्र कृषी विद्यापीठाचे कार्यालय मुंबई येथे होते.

खालीलपैकी कोणती विधाने बरोबर आहेत?
(a) वैतरणा आणि तानसा उल्हास नदीच्या उपनद्या आहेत.
(b) खानापूर पठाराच्या दक्षिणेला कृष्णा नदीचे खोरे आहे.
(c) मन्याड नदी खोरे गोदावरी नदी खोऱ्यात आहे.

पुढील विधाने विचारात घ्या:
(a) अटल इनोव्हेशन मिशन (AIM) हा केंद्र शासनाचा पुढाकार आहे.
(b) AIM ही नवनिर्माण आणि उद्योजकता परिसंस्था उपरण्यास कारणीभूत आहे.

भारतीय आर्थिक सर्वेक्षण/पाहणी अहवाल 2022-23 अनुसार मेक इन इंडिया 2.0 अंतर्गत खालीलपैकी कोणत्या उप-क्षेत्रांचा समावेश आहे?
(a) पोलाद
(b) व्यायामशाळा उपकरणे
(c) खेळणी
(d) मत्स्यपालन
केंद्रशासन मान्यताप्राप्त स्टार्टअपमध्ये अखिल भारतीय स्तरावर मार्च 2024 पर्यंत महाराष्ट्र राज्याचा हिस्सा _________ आहे.
19 जुलै, 1969 रोजी किती खाजगी व्यापारी बॅंकांचे राष्ट्रीयीकरण करण्यात आले?

योग्य जोड्या जुळवा.
(a) बॅंकिग नियंत्रण कायदा - (i) सामाजिक उद्देश
(b) बॅंक राष्ट्रीयीकरण - (ii) बारा (12)
(c) 31 मार्च 2025 रोजी भारतातील सार्वजनिक क्षेत्रातील बॅंका - (iii) मध्यवर्ती बॅंकेचे नियमनाचे अधिकार
(d) शाखा विस्तार - (iv) ठेवीचे अधिक संकलन

Consider the following statements:
(a) India's Foodgrains production touched a record 315.7 million tonnes in 2021-22.
(b) India's productivity of millets excluding jowar was higher than Ethiopia.
Which of the statement/s given above is/are correct?
options: None of the above are correct.

questions.text:
Match the column.
A (Article No.) - B (Provision)
(a) 112 - (i) Annual Financial statement
(b) 151 - (ii) Audit Reports
(c) 267 - (iii) Contingency fund
(d) 280 - (iv) Finance Commission
भारतीय रिझर्व्ह बॅंकेद्वारे, आर्थिक समावेशन कळफलक (डॅशबोर्ड) 'अंतर्दृष्टी' _________ मध्ये सुरू करण्यात आला.

राजकोषीय तूट म्हणजे:
(a) सरकारी कर्जे वगळता सरकारच्या एकूण खर्च आणि एकूण प्राप्तीतील फरक.
(b) भांडवली खर्च व महसूली उत्पन्न यातील फरक.
(c) महसूली खर्च व महसूली उत्पन्न यातील फरक.

खालीलपैकी कोणती भारतीय रिझर्व्ह बॅंकेच्या मौद्रिक धोरणाची संख्यात्मक साधने आहेत?
(a) विशिष्ट प्रकारच्या अग्रिमांवर भेदभावपूर्ण व्याज आकारले जाते.
(b) रेपो दर
(c) पत अधिकृतता योजना
(d) खुल्या बाजारातील खरेदी-विक्री

खालीलपैकी कोणते/ती लेखापालनाची तत्व/त्वे आहेत?
(a) जमा/उपार्जित तत्व
(b) भौतिकतेचे तत्व
(c) आर्थिक घटक तत्व
(d) मौद्रिक एकक तत्व
छापील पैशांचा वापर करून सरकार जेव्हा आपल्या अंदाजपत्रकातील तूट काढते, त्यामुळे _________ वाढू शकते.

Which of the following is/are characteristics of 'Ability to pay Principle'?
(a) High income earners and wealthier individuals should pay more income tax.
(b) Low income earners and poor peoples are exempted from paying income tax.
भारताच्या 16 व्या वित्त आयोगाचे अध्यक्ष कोण आहेत?

Consider the following statements:
(a) The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) set up a high level committee on agricultural credit in December 1997.
(b) Mr. R.V. Gupta was Chairman of a high level committee on agricultural credit.
Which of the statement/s given above is/are correct?
options: None of the above are correct.

questions.text: India's growth remain robust with _________ GDP growth in financial year 2024-25, and is projected to continue on the growth path.

The Paris AI Action Summit, 2025 co-chaired by _________ and _________, marks a pivotal moment in the world of AI, bringing together over 90 nations to address critical challenges from digital divide to AI safety.
Where is China constructing the world's largest hydro-power dam, which is expected to be completed by the year 2030?

Match the pairs: (Dronacharya Award, 2024)
'A' (Coach) - 'B' (Sport Discipline)
(a) Subhash Rana - (i) Shooting
(b) Deepali Deshpande - (ii) Para-shooting
(c) Sandeep Sangwan - (iii) Hockey
(d) S. Muralidharan - (iv) Badminton
India's Multipurpose Green Hydrogen Pilot Project was inaugurated by Satlaj Jal Vidyut Nigam (SJVN) at its Hydro Power Station in Jhakri, _________ in April 2024.
Dorababu Daparti has been appointed as the Deputy Chief Executive Officer of which of the following companies in February 2025?
Who became the Brand Ambassador for Audi India in May 2025?
Air New Zealand has announced _________ as their next CEO in July 2025.

Select the correct statement/s from the following:
(a) 'World Music Day' celebrated annually on September 09, encourages free public musical performances worldwide.
(b) The World Music Day, 2025 has a theme "Healing through Harmony".
Who among the following has been appointed in August 2025 as executive director at the International Monetary Fund (IMF)?

Match the pairs: (Sahitya Akademi Yuva Puraskar, 2025)
'A' (Book/Poetry) - 'B' (Writer/Poet)
(a) Girls Hostel - (i) Parvati Tirkey
(b) Phir Ugna - (ii) Mandeep Aulakh
(c) Ang Asur - (iii) Advait Kottary
(d) Siddhartha - The boy who became the Buddha - (iv) Amar Kungur Boro
Which of the following won the Prestigious 'Best Magic Creator' Award at the 2025 FISM World Championship of Magic?

Select the correct statement/s from the following:
(a) 'The Youth Spiritual Summit 2025' was held in July 2025 at Varanasi.
(b) The theme of 'Youth Spiritual Summit 2025' was "Jagega Yuva, Badhega Yuva".
Who among the following has inaugurated Computer Security Incident Response Team (CSIRT)-Power Facility in New Delhi in September 2024?

Find the correct statements about Pahalgam from the sentences given below.
(a) Pahalgam is situated in the District of Anantnag.
(b) Lidder Nallah attracts tourists in Pahalgam.
(c) It is an important transit camp on the way to Shri Mata Vaishno Devi.

Which of the following about Article 243-G in the Constitution of India is/are correct?
(a) Disqualification of membership
(b) Powers, authority and responsibilities of Panchayats
(c) Composition of Panchayats
(d) Duration of Panchayats

Which of the following statement/statements is/are correct?
(a) The office of the Advocate General for the State of Maharashtra came into existence with the formation of the State itself on May 1, 1960.
(b) The Advocate General shall be appointed in accordance with the provisions of Article 165 of the Constitution of India.
(c) Birendra Saraf is the Advocate General of Maharashtra. (as of August 2025)

Which of the following is not fundamental duties?
(1) To strive towards excellence in all spheres of individual and collective activity so that the nation constantly rises to higher levels of endeavour and achievement.
(2) Who is parent or guardian to provide opportunities for education to his child or as the case may be ward between the age of six and fourteen years.
(3) Promote equal justice and free legal aid to the poor.
(4) To defend the country and render national service when called upon to do so.
Who among the following has served as the Chief Minister of Maharashtra for the longest period till September 2025?
Which of the following is mentioned in Article-349?
options: Special procedure for the implementation of certain laws relating to language.
Language to be used in the Supreme Court and High Courts and for laws, bills etc.
Facilities for education in mother tongue at the primary level.
Directions for the development of Hindi language.

questions.text:
Match:
List-I (Item in the Indian Constitution) - List-II (Country from which it is derived)
(a) Directive Principles of State Policy - (i) Australia
(b) Fundamental Rights - (ii) Canada
(c) Concurrent list in Union State relations - (iii) Ireland
(d) India as a Union of States with greater powers to union - (iv) UK
(v) USA
Which of the following is mentioned in Article-8 of the Indian Constitution?
options: Rights of Citizenship of certain persons who have migrated to India from Pakistan.
Rights of Citizenship of certain persons of Indian origin residing outside India.
Rights of Citizenship of certain persons migrated to Pakistan.
Parliament to regulate the right of Citizenship by Law.

questions.text:
Select the incorrect statement/s about qualification of Vice-President.
(a) is a citizen of India.
(b) has completed the age of forty five years.
(c) is qualified for election as a member of House of People (Lok Sabha).

Select the correct statements about Role of Prime Minister:
(a) Ramsay Muir - "Prime Minister is the steersman of steering wheel of the ship of the state."
(b) H.R.G. Greaves - "The Government is the master of the country and Prime Minister is the master of Government."
(c) Munro - "Prime Minister is a moon among lesser stars."

In 1950, the Constitution of India contained a four-fold classification of units of the Indian Union.
(a) Part A - Princely states with legislature
(b) Part B - Governor's provinces of British India
(c) Part C - Chief Commissioner's provinces of British India
(d) Part D - Andaman and Nicobar Islands
Select the correct pairs from the above:

Which of the following statement/statements is/are false in concern with the Governor?
(a) As per Article 158 the Governor shall hold office during the pleasure of the President.
(b) As per Article 155 the Governor of a state shall be appointed by the President by warrant under his hand and seal.
(c) As per Article 154 the executive power of the state shall be vested in the Governor and shall be exercised by him either directly or through officers subordinate to him in accordance with this Constitution.
(d) As per Article 163 there shall be a council of ministers with the Chief Minister at the head to aid and advise the Governor.

Match the following:
List-I (Subject) - List-II (Article No.)
(a) Gram Sabha - (i) 243 K
(b) Reservation of seats - (ii) 243 F
(c) Elections to the Panchayats - (iii) 243 A
(d) Disqualification for membership - (iv) 243 D

Which of the following statements are related to Article 20 of the Constitution of India?
(a) No person shall be deprived of his life or personal liberty except according to procedure established by law.
(b) No person shall be prosecuted and punished for the same offence more than once.
(c) No person accused of any offence shall be compelled to be a witness against himself.
(d) The state shall provide free and compulsory education to all children of the age of six to fourteen years.

Which of the following statement/statements is/are not included in Article 168?
(a) For every state there shall be a legislature which shall consist of the Governor.
(b) Where there are two Houses of the Legislature of a state, one shall be known as the Legislative Council and other as the Legislative Assembly.
(c) Where there is only one house, it shall be known as the Legislative Assembly.
(d) The Legislative Assembly of each state shall consist of not more than five hundred and not less than sixty members chosen by direct election from territorial constituencies in the state.
Which of the following articles and parts of the Indian Constitution enumerate fundamental duties?

State whether following statements are true or false:
(a) X-rays are electromagnetic waves.
(b) The wavelength of X-ray is very short.
(c) X-rays are having negative charge.
(d) X-rays are deflected by electric and magnetic fields.

Match the pairs.
(a) Alpha particle - (i) Curie
(b) Beta particle - (ii) Electron
(c) Unit of Radioactivity - (iii) ₂He⁴-Helium atom
(d) Gamma rays - (iv) Photon of high energy
Latent heat of fusion is defined as _________.
options: the amount of heat required to heat unit mass of the substance.
the amount of heat required to raise the temperature of a unit mass through 1°C.
the amount of heat required to convert unit mass of the substance from solid to liquid at its melting point without rise of temperature.

What symptoms of phosphorus deficiency is characterised by stunted growth of the entire plant, dark green colouration at the leaves which may be malformed and contains small areas of dead tissues is called as?
Which mineral plays important role in calcium metabolism of plants?
_________ vitamin helps in blood clotting.
ABO blood group was discovered by _________.
World Diabetes Day is celebrated on _________.
The sum of the first 15 terms of the series 1/(2×3) + 1/(3×4) + 1/(4×5) + ......... is:
The sum of six consecutive even numbers A, B, C, D, E, F is 150. What is the sum of the next three consecutive even numbers?
An empty pool being filled with water at a constant rate takes 8 hours to fill 3/5 of its capacity. How much more time will it take to fill the pool completely?

In measuring the sides of a rectangle, there is an increase of 5% on one side and 10% decrease on the other side. Then the absolute error percentage in the calculation of area of the rectangle is _________.
The curved surface of a cylindrical pillar is 352 m² and its volume is 2464 m³. What is the height of the pillar?

A company manufactures electronic equipment. While deciding price of that equipment, the company includes 10% profit for itself, 20% profit for wholesaler and 30% profit for retailer. By how much percent is the decided price more than manufacturing cost of that equipment?
In a country the ratio of number of states to number of union territories is 52 : 13. By how much percentage is the number of states more than the number of union territories in that country?
Mobile users percentage increased from 43% to 65% in the year 2024. What is the percentage increase relative to 43%?

The amount of work done by 3 men is same as that done by 5 boys. Similarly, the amount of work done by 5 women is equal to that done by 8 boys. If 12 men and 14 boys require 24 days to finish the work, then how many days will be needed for 9 men, 15 women and 12 boys to complete the work?

The average price of 10 books is ₹ 16 while the average price of eight books is ₹ 9.5, of the remaining two books. If the price of one book is 40% more than the price of the other. What is the price of each of these two books?
How many numbers from 1 to 100 are there each of which is exactly divisible by 4 and also has '4' as digit in it?
In a row of 21 girls, when Monika was shifted by four places towards the right, she became 12th from the left end. What was her earlier position from right end of the row before shifting?
